# Opnsense Tools

## Overview

gSage AI — OPNsense read-only firewall tool.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `opnsense_firewall` | Read-only OPNsense firewall: aliases, rules, firewall log, live states, Suricata IDS alerts, gateways, DHCP leases, ARP, services. Auto-CSV on >100 rows. | `firewall:read` | — | — |
| `opnsense_manage` | Approval-gated OPNsense actions: block/unblock IP (+kill states), manage filter rules, toggle Suricata rules, restart services. | `firewall:write` | ✓ | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** — you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "host": "",
  "api_key": "",
  "api_secret": ""
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "api_key": "",
  "api_secret": "",
  "block_alias": "",
  "host": "",
  "port": 443,
  "timeout": 30,
  "verify_ssl": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_key` | `string` | ✓ | — | `""` | OPNsense API key (Basic-auth username). |
| `api_secret` | `string` | ✓ | — | `""` | OPNsense API secret (Basic-auth password; sensitive). |
| `block_alias` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Default firewall alias for block_ip / unblock_ip (e.g. 'gsage_blocklist'). Must exist and be referenced by a block rule. |
| `host` | `string` | ✓ | — | `""` | OPNsense FQDN or IP address. |
| `port` | `integer` | — | — | `443` | OPNsense HTTPS port (default 443). |
| `timeout` | `integer` | — | — | `30` | Per-request timeout in seconds (default 30). |
| `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | — | — | `true` | Validate the OPNsense TLS certificate (default true). Set false for the default self-signed certificate. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_OPNSENSE__API_KEY` | `api_key` | `string` | `""` | — | OPNsense API key (Basic-auth username). |
| `TOOL_OPNSENSE__API_SECRET` | `api_secret` | `string` | `""` | — | OPNsense API secret (Basic-auth password; sensitive). |
| `TOOL_OPNSENSE__BLOCK_ALIAS` | `block_alias` | `string` | `""` | — | Default firewall alias for block_ip / unblock_ip (e.g. 'gsage_blocklist'). Must exist and be referenced by a block rule. |
| `TOOL_OPNSENSE__HOST` | `host` | `string` | `""` | — | OPNsense FQDN or IP address. |
| `TOOL_OPNSENSE__PORT` | `port` | `integer` | `443` | — | OPNsense HTTPS port (default 443). |
| `TOOL_OPNSENSE__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | — | Per-request timeout in seconds (default 30). |
| `TOOL_OPNSENSE__VERIFY_SSL` | `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | `true` | — | Validate the OPNsense TLS certificate (default true). Set false for the default self-signed certificate. |
| `TOOL_OPNSENSE_MANAGE__AUTO_APPROVE` | `auto_approve` | `boolean` | `false` | — | When true, HITL approval requests for this tool are auto-approved by the backend without human review. Useful for lab/dev environments. DB toolconfig overrides env TOOL_<NAME>__AUTO_APPROVE; default is false. |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` — useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `opnsense_firewall`

- **`arp_table`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | — | GSageToolConfig profile (firewall) to use. Omit for the 'default' profile. |
  | `alias` | `string` | — | [get_alias_entries] Alias name. Defaults to the profile's configured block_alias. |
  | `ip` | `string` | — | [firewall_log, query_states, ids_alerts] Filter results to those mentioning this IP (substring match). |
  | `max_results` | `integer` | — | Maximum items to return (default 100, hard cap 2000). |
  | `force_refresh` | `boolean` | — | Bypass the Redis cache for cacheable reads (alias / rule / service lists). Cache TTL is 60s. |
  | `export_csv` | `boolean` | — | Force CSV artifact even for small results. CSV is generated automatically over 100 rows. |
  | `export_json` | `boolean` | — | Persist the full result as a JSON artifact. |

### `opnsense_manage`

- **`add_rule`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `rule_action` | `string` | — | [add_rule] pass \| block \| reject. |
  | `interface` | `string` | — | [add_rule] Interface (e.g. 'wan', 'lan'). |
  | `direction` | `string` | — | [add_rule] Traffic direction (default 'in'). |
  | `protocol` | `string` | — | [add_rule] Protocol (e.g. 'any', 'TCP', 'UDP'). |
  | `source_net` | `string` | — | [add_rule] Source (IP/CIDR/alias/'any'). |
  | `destination_net` | `string` | — | [add_rule] Destination (IP/CIDR/alias/'any'). |
  | `destination_port` | `string` | — | [add_rule] Destination port (e.g. '443'). |
  | `description` | `string` | — | [add_rule] Rule description. |

- **`block_ip`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `ip` | `string` | — | [block_ip, unblock_ip, kill_states] Target IPv4/IPv6 address (or CIDR for alias actions). |
  | `alias` | `string` | — | [block_ip, unblock_ip] Firewall alias to modify. Defaults to the profile's block_alias. |
  | `kill_states` | `boolean` | — | [block_ip] Also drop the IP's active states so the block applies to existing connections (default true). |

- **`del_rule`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `uuid` | `string` | — | [toggle_rule, del_rule] Rule UUID. |

- **`ids_toggle_rule`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `enabled` | `boolean` | — | [toggle_rule, ids_toggle_rule] Desired enabled state. |
  | `sid` | `string` | — | [ids_toggle_rule] Suricata signature ID (SID). |

- **`kill_states`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `ip` | `string` | — | [block_ip, unblock_ip, kill_states] Target IPv4/IPv6 address (or CIDR for alias actions). |

- **`restart_service`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `service` | `string` | — | [restart_service] OPNsense service name (e.g. 'suricata', 'unbound'). |

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `uuid` | `string` | — | [toggle_rule, del_rule] Rule UUID. |
  | `enabled` | `boolean` | — | [toggle_rule, ids_toggle_rule] Desired enabled state. |
  | `sid` | `string` | — | [ids_toggle_rule] Suricata signature ID (SID). |

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `ip` | `string` | — | [block_ip, unblock_ip, kill_states] Target IPv4/IPv6 address (or CIDR for alias actions). |
  | `alias` | `string` | — | [block_ip, unblock_ip] Firewall alias to modify. Defaults to the profile's block_alias. |


## Permissions required

| Tool | Permissions |
| --- | --- |
| `opnsense_firewall` | `firewall:read` |
| `opnsense_manage` | `firewall:write` |

| Tool | Version | Rate limit/min | Timeout (s) | Circuit breaker | Background | Multi-config |
